message:
test(fuzz): AuditEvent::follows + is_genesis (pxups)

Add fuzz_audit_event_follows covering fcp_core::AuditEvent chain-link
predicates (audit.rs:92, 108). The existing audit_verify_chain fuzz
covers fcp_audit::AuditEntry, a different cross-crate type — fcp_core's
AuditEvent::follows was unfuzzed. Properties: is_genesis truth table
(seq=0 && prev=None), follows happy path, wrong-predecessor-id
rejection, wrong-seq rejection (delta != 1, including duplicate seq),
genesis cannot follow, u64::MAX overflow rejection (no successor when
prev.seq saturates), self-link rejection, prev=None on self →
follows=false. Once-gated anchors verify each branch on hand-picked
events including the u64::MAX overflow and self-link cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
